# Asociación Deportiva Curundú (ADC)

## What ADC is
Asociación Deportiva Curundú (ADC) is a 100% volunteer-led nonprofit youth soccer foundation based in the Curundú neighborhood of Panama City, Panama. Founded in 2014, ADC transforms lives through three integrated pillars: sport, education, and nutrition. ADC has served more than 1,200 young people since its founding and currently has 130+ active athletes. Five ADC athletes have represented Panama on the national team.

## Mission
To empower children and youth in Curundú through free access to organized football, academic support, and healthy nutrition — regardless of their socioeconomic background.

## Programs
- **Sport:** Competitive youth football for ages 6–16 across five categories: Sub-8, Sub-10, Sub-12, Sub-14, and Sub-16. Training takes place at Ciudad del Saber, Panama City. Schedule: Mondays and Wednesdays, 1:00–3:00 PM.
- **Education:** Academic tutoring, school materials, and mentorship for ADC athletes.
- **Nutrition:** Healthy snacks and meals during training sessions to support athlete development.

## Key facts
- Founded: 2014
- Location: Curundú, Panama City, Panama; training at Ciudad del Saber
- Youth served since 2014: 1,200+
- Active athletes: 130+
- National team players produced: 5
- Years of operation: 12
- Organization type: 100% nonprofit, volunteer-led
- Admission: Free for all participants
- Press coverage: Featured in Newsroom Panamá (August 2025)

## Corporate partnerships & sponsorship
ADC actively seeks corporate partners in Panama, particularly in the sports, nutrition, and education sectors. Companies that partner with ADC can access the following benefits (specific scope and details defined per partnership — contact for custom packages):

- **Brand visibility:** Company logo on player kits, field banners, and the ADC website throughout the season
- **Social media content:** Shoutouts and co-created content on ADC's Instagram (@adcurundu), YouTube (@ADCurundu), and Facebook channels
- **Employee volunteering days:** Corporate teams visit Curundú to train alongside athletes and participate in ADC programs — ideal for CSR reporting and team building
- **Tour con Propósito (community tour):** An immersive guided visit to Curundú — meet the founders, walk the fields, and see ADC's impact firsthand; suitable for executives and leadership teams

ADC is well aligned with companies in: sports equipment and apparel, nutrition and food and beverage, education and youth development, financial services, and any sector with a Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) or Responsabilidad Social Empresarial (RSE) mandate in Panama.

## Why partner with ADC
- Authentic community presence in one of Panama City's most densely populated neighborhoods
- Documented impact: 1,200+ youth served, 5 national team players, 12 consecutive years
- International media coverage (Newsroom Panamá)
- Bilingual audience (Spanish/English) — relevant for multinationals operating in Panama
- Existing sponsors include: Cristalina, Afrolatinx Travel, CR Enterprise, Duke Engage

## How to help
- **Donate:** adcurundu.org/donar.html (GoFundMe campaign: Scoring for Success — goal $30,000 by July 19, 2026)
- **Volunteer:** adcurundu.org/participar.html
- **Corporate partnerships:** adcurundu.org/alianzas.html — or contact adcurundu@gmail.com
- **Community tour:** adcurundu.org/acercadeadc.html (Tour con Propósito section)
- **US mail address:** PTY898076 Andres Madrid, 2250 NW 114th Ave, Miami, FL 33192
